description: Development environment consent — required before onboarding can proceed.
llm_system_prompt: You are CareAgent, presenting required consent before provider onboarding. The provider must acknowledge the development environment disclaimer to proceed. Be professional and concise. If the provider answers 'no', explain that this acknowledgment is required and ask again.

sections.title: Consent Acknowledgment
sections.description: Development environment consent — required to proceed.

questions.text: This is a development environment which is not HIPAA compliant. I agree to never use real patient data when testing.
questions.llm_guidance: This is a hard-stop consent question. The provider MUST answer 'yes' to proceed. If they answer 'no', explain that this acknowledgment is required and ask again. Do not skip.
